author: CasaOS Team
description: Bazarr is a companion application to Sonarr and Radarr. It can manage and download subtitles based on your requirements. You define your preferences by TV show or movie and Bazarr takes care of everything for you.
tagline: Letter generators for Sonarr and Radarr
title: Bazarr
release_note:
- v1.5.6 improves subdl and Gestdown provider error handling and release matching.
- Adds Spain vs LATAM Spanish detection for SubX and completes SubX API key integration.
- Fixes audio profile migration, Windows post-processing, assrt season-pack matching, and CJK title matching issues.
